name: design-context-scout
description: Explores the repository and any provided design sources to produce a durable design context document.
fallback: If no design system is found, parks at awaiting_human with no_design_system_found: true — human must provide design reference before scout can complete.

name: design-proposer
description: Converts design context and user intent into a bounded sprint proposal and contract, then parks for human approval.
fallback: If proposal inputs are ambiguous, parks at awaiting_human with human_action_required populated. If design context is untrusted, stops and returns to scout.

name: design-builder
description: Implements the HTML artifact within the approved contract scope.
fallback: If entry checks fail, parks at awaiting_human. If attempt budget exhausted, escalates to human. Requires clean_restore_ref in status.json before any artifact file is written.

name: design-reviewer
description: Adversarially evaluates the artifact against the contract, runs the design quality audit, and issues a PASS, FAIL, or BLOCKED verdict.
fallback: If browser tool is unavailable, uses static analysis fallback (see design-reviewer/SKILL.md Capability Requirements). Sprint-wide BLOCKED only when artifact file is missing or unreadable.

name: design-compounder
description: Distills durable design learnings from a concluded sprint into .agents-stack/memory.md with artifact-linked provenance.
fallback: If no durable learning survives the 3-criteria filter, records a dated deliberate-skip note. Never invents lessons without artifact-linked provenance.
